title: Just Pets
description: Just Pets is a mod that adds cute animal pets to your game!
body:
Welcome to **Just Pets**, a mod that adds new cute animals which you can tame of course!

Explore your world to find new friends, or go on an adventure with those u find on the way!
The pets wont hold you back, they will help as much sa they can with their abilities!

Current pet rooster has:
- **Jerboa** - tameable with dried seeds (put seeds into smoker), Biome: Desert, Badlands

![Jerboa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc9471282811cf047be98efe02e2b1105cd0a5df.png)

[To report issues/bugs or give your ideas, please consider joining our discord!](https://discord.gg/JcBwPBcyF3)
